allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, html, re content = sys.stdin.read\(\) content = re.sub\(r'<script[^>]*>.*?</script>', '', content, flags=re.DOTALL|re.IGNORECASE\) content = re.sub\(r'<style[^>]*>.*?</style>', '', content, flags=re.DOTALL|re.IGNORECASE\) content = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', content\) content = html.unescape\(content\) lines = [l.strip\(\) for l in re.split\(r'\\s{2,}|\\n', content\) if l.strip\(\)] for l in lines: print\(l\) ")
